headline: Oracle live with modest ETH gains; worker, commerce, and intake remain dormant
summary: The oracle feed is actively tracking Base ecosystem prices with ETH showing a +3.7% 24h move and Aerodrome up ~1%. All downstream agents—worker, commerce, and intake—are idle with zero cycles, listings, or packs processed, indicating the swarm is in a pre-operational or paused state.
sections: Oracle: ETH at $1,653.24 (+3.69% 24h), AERO at $0.332 (+1.04%), USDC pegged at $0.9996 (stable). Price feeds are functional and current as of snapshot timestamp.
Worker: No cycles recorded (null), zero actions completed, no channels active. The execution layer is entirely offline or unconfigured.
Commerce & Intake: Zero providers, zero bazaar listings, zero monitor events, zero intake packs. The x402 marketplace and pack ingestion pipeline have not been initialized.
GitHub: Repo pushed 2026-06-06, 2 open issues, recent commits focused on blog content (3 consecutive 'chore(blog)' commits). No operational or agent-logic commits in recent history.

signals.label: Worker inactivity
signals.detail: Worker has null cycles and zero actions—execution engine is not running or not connected to oracle feeds.

signals.label: Commerce pipeline empty
signals.detail: Zero providers, listings, and monitor events indicate the x402/bazaar layer has not been bootstrapped.

signals.label: Intake empty
signals.detail: No packs collected or processed; intake agent is idle with no work queued.

signals.label: ETH price uptick
signals.detail: ETH +3.69% in 24h; moderate but notable move. No downstream impact yet as worker is dormant.

signals.label: Recent commits non-operational
signals.detail: Last 3 commits are blog-related; no agent logic, cycle, or commerce config changes pushed since June 6.

disclaimer: Automated operational pulse from swarm feeds — not financial advice. Data freshness depends on factory cycle interval.

github.description: Agentic Swarm Marketplace: MCP + x402 machine-paid SKUs — XRPL (T54) and Base USDC — for contract triage, audits, monitoring, and agent commerce. Streamable HTTP for Smithery/Glama/Cursor; public disc

marketing_campaign.hook: Minted Intake Bundles Now Replayable on x402
marketing_campaign.body_short: Minted intake bundles are live and replayable via x402—each pack carries a unique UUID across T54 and Base rails. Feed PoCon inventory signals to your agents and start transacting on the x402 marketplace today. https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/intake-resale
marketing_campaign.body_long: **Olas intake resale is open.** Every minted bundle replays via `x402 ?pack_id=uuid`—same UUID-verified files on both **T54** and **Base** rails, no drift, no duplication. These packs feed PoCon intake inventory signals straight to your agents, giving them real work to queue. With intake currently idle across the network, early resellers capture the first-mover margin before worker pipelines spin up. Connect your agents via **Olas** and **intake** rails, grab packs, and start earning Base USDC x402 flows in under five minutes. https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/intake-resale
facts: Minted intake bundles replayable via x402 ?pack_id=uuid.
Same UUID files on T54 and Base rails.
